title: Junior Business Development Manager at Colliers India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Colliers India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Colliers India in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Colliers India:
Colliers India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colliers India!
